title: Burgundy Satin Ribbon 25mm x 23 Metres, Wine Red Solid Color Fabric Silk Ribbon for Crafting, Gift Wrapping, Wedding Bouquet, Flower Arrangement, Bows Making, Balloons, Cake Decoration and Baby Shower
features: Wine Red Satin Ribbon – burgundy ribbon is made of premium single faced polyester fabric, soft and luxurious. The surface is very smooth, one side is full of glossy. Great for DIY sewing craft projects

Elegant Design - each roll is 1”(25mm) in width, total 25 yards(23meters) in length. Enough length for your daily craft needs, you can cut into any length for your needs. Each color is very bright, ideal gift wrap ribbons for DIY lovers and home decorations

As Gift Wrap Ribbons - gift ribbon is suitable for many occasions, which can be applied for gift wrapping in wedding party, baby shower, birthday party, graduation, anniversary, Easter, Thanksgiving, Halloween, Christmas, Mother’s Day, Father’s Day, New Year, Bridal Shower, engagement, etc. As decorative ribbon, which can enrich the sense of festival ceremony and give you a warm atmosphere

Ribbon for Crafts - satin ribbon not only can be used for DIY crafts projects, such as bows making, scrapbooking, ribbon chandelier, ribbon wands, rose flowers, corsage, graduation leis, DIY hair accessories, but also decorating for favor boxes, wreaths, clothing, cakes, balloons, flower arrangement, bridal bouquet, souvenir, vase, embroidery, invitation cards, wedding cars, easter eggs, basket, Xmas trees, festival banners, etc
Warm Notes - please keep the ends of the ribbon to prevent loosening and threading when you are not using
description: Product Description 23m Fabric Ribbons Sewing Ribbon Gift 1. The ribbon is made of high quality single-sided polyester fabric, soft and luxurious. The surface is very smooth and one side is glossy. Ideal for DIY sewing craft projects. Each roll has a width of 3 / 8 in (10 mm) and a total length of 25 yards (23 M)3. Enough length for DIY craft projects Satin ribbon can be used not only for DIY craft projects, such as making bows, scrapbooking, roses, corsages, graduation garland, DIY hair accessories, but also for decorating gift boxes, garlands, clothes, cakes, balloons, floral arrangements, bridal bouquets, souvenirs, vases, embroidery, invitations, wedding cars, Easter eggs, baskets, Christmas trees, festival banners, etc Please keep the ends of the tape to prevent loosening and threading when you are not using it Gift Wrapping Tape Christmas Decorations Baby Shower Tape DIY Crafts Arc Making Flowers bouquet decoration
